TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Masalipa:Otheruses Taywan O cecay a kitakit ko Taywan. Itini i 23 30 N, 121 00 E, noAsiya ko Taywan. Polong no sekalay i 35,980 sq km "saka 139 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 32,260 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,720 sq km " Polong i 23,464,787 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 22.70%, malo no roma to a sera 77.30%. siyoto O Taypak ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 10 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Cay ing-wen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: masa…ĺipa:o~utńß…ôro~u~us…ôs tajwan o~u ¶…ô ¶aj a kitakit ko~u tajwan. itini i ** ** n, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u tajwan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u tajpak ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i ¶aj iŇč-w…ôn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Masalipa:Otheruses Taywan O cecay a kitakit ko Taywan. Itini i 23 30 N, 121 00 E, noAsiya ko Taywan. Polong no sekalay i 35,980 sq km "saka 139 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 32,260 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,720 sq km " Polong i 23,464,787 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 22.70%, malo no roma to a sera 77.30%. siyoto O Taypak ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 10 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Cay ing-wen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
